title: batch: call_batch() silently drops duplicate call_id responses
description: If the server (or a buggy caller) produces two responses with the same call_id, the HashMap in call_batch() silently keeps only the last one. RFC 8620 §3.3 prohibits duplicate call_ids, but a defensive impl should document or detect this. Add a note to the docstring, or use entry API to detect duplicates and return an error.
close_reason: Fixed: to_value() uses json! macro, call_batch() detects duplicate call_ids, new() docstring updated
